name: Pasta W/Broccoli and Garlic
recipeIngredient: 1 large bunch, trimmed and cut into flowerettes, broccoli
6 large garlic cloves, sliced paper thin
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook broccoli to desired tenderness in lightly salted boiling water.
2. Reserve 1 cup of the broccoli cooking water. Drain remaining water from broccoli and cut into bite-size chunks; set aside.
3. In a medium saucepan, heat olive oil over medium. Add garlic slices and stir until lightly and evenly browned (optional: remove and discard garlic).
4. Add butter, stirring until melted. Add red pepper flakes and simmer for 3 minutes.
5. Add the reserved broccoli water and simmer another minute. Turn off heat and add the broccoli; cover and set aside while cooking pasta.
6. Place cooked pasta into a large bowl. Pour the broccoli sauce over pasta.
7. Toss to coat and serve with freshly grated Parmesan cheese and black pepper.
